name: Laksa Gravy
recipeIngredient: 6 small Dried red chilies, soaked in warm water
1 Stalk lemon grass, lower part only
2 tbsp Dried shrimp, soaked and pounded
2 cans Coconut milk (13 1/2 oz) Reserved chicken stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound together chilies, lemon grass, shallots, galangal, candlenuts, and shrimp paste or grind in a food processor or blender, adding 1 1/2 tablespoons oil.
2. Stir in turmeric and coriander.
3. Heat remaining oil in a large saucepan. Add ground ingredients and fry gently, stirring frequently for 4-5 minutes.
4. Add dried shrimp and fry for 2 minutes. Remove the thick coconut milk from the top of the unshaken can using a ladle. Combine the remaining milks (there should be 3 cups thinner coconut milk).
5. Add thin coconut milk and reserved chicken stock to the fried mixture, stirring constantly. Bring to boil.
6. Add fish balls and simmer for 5 minutes. Add thick coconut milk and salt, then simmer until gravy thickens.
